passive.name: Galactic Power
passive.description: When Yve deals damage to enemy heroes with her skills, she gains Galactic Power (Cooldown: 0.5s), up to 3 stacks. Each stack provides Yve with a 120 (+10*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) shield for 3s.

skill1.name: Void Blast
skill1.description:
Yve detonates Galactic Energy at the target location, dealing 290 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in the area.
Successfully hitting an enemy grants Yve 55% extra Movement Speed (halved if a non-hero enemy is hit) that decreases over 1s.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=3.0/2.7/2.4/2.1/1.8/1.5
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=40/45/50/55/60/65
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=290/340/390/440/490/540

skill2.name: Void Crystal
skill2.description:
Yve summons a Void Crystal at the target location, dealing 220 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies.
Use Again: Yve commands the Crystal to fire materialized energy in the target direction for 2.7s, dealing 75 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.45s to enemies hit and slowing them by 20%. Enemies hit multiple times are slowed by an extra 4% for each hit after the first hit (up to 40%).
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=14.0/13.2/12.4/11.6/10.8/10.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=80/90/100/110/120/130
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=220/260/300/340/380/420
|stats4=Sustained Damage|stats4_value=75/85/95/105/115/125

ultimate.name: Real World Manipulation
ultimate.description:
Yve creates a Starfield that lasts 15s. Within the duration, you can Tap or Swipe the screen to attack up to 20 times.
Tap: Deals 340 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in the target area.
Swipe: Deals 85 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.45s to enemies in the target area for 2.7s and slows them by 40%.
Enemies leaving or entering the Starfield will be immobilized for 0.8s (only once against the same target).
Yve cannot be displaced while the Starfield is active, and the Starfield will remain even if Yve is controlled (except for Suppression).
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=180/220/260
|stats2=Tap Damage|stats2_value=340/440/540
|stats3=Swipe Damage|stats3_value=85/105/125
